name: Chocolate Torte
recipeIngredient: 2 packages almond slices, toasted (reserve 1/2 cup for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sugar, cocoa, and milk together until thick and let cool.
2. Cream Crisco and sugar, adding eggs one at a time. Add remaining ingredients and beat well. Add cocoa mixture. Pour into 3 greased and floured round pans. Bake for 45 minutes at 325 degrees F.
3. Filling:
- Melt chocolate in double boiler. Let cool. Add butter. Beat at low speed until smooth. Fold in almonds gently, reserving 1/2 cup for garnish. Spread 1/3 over each layer. Garnish top with reserved almonds.
4. Whipped Cream Topping: Beat at high speed until whipped. You may spread this between the layers after the chocolate hard sauce or just on the top or individually.
